svg.title: Athlete persona sampling and dataset connection chain
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how athlete_id connects to OPL dataset, 600K dataset, periodization templates, and output CSVs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the OPL row selection work?')
g.text: seed → randint(0, n-1) → walk forward if taken

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What fields come from the OPL row?')
g.text: AthletePersona — all fields from one OPL row
sex · age · bodyweight · weight class · squat/bench/deadlift · total · Dots
Dots → classify_training_level() → novice / intermediate / advanced / elite
per training level, from OPL pop.
rounded 2.5 kg · RPE from curve · accessories from pool

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I trace back to the OPL row?')
sendPrompt('How do I trace back to the program?')
